name: Loar Holdings Inc.
business: Loar Holdings Inc. specializes in the design, manufacture, and sale of niche aerospace and defense components. It primarily serves three core end markets: commercial aerospace, business jet and general aviation, and defense. Approximately 55% of its 2025 net sales were derived from aftermarket products.

exposures.sentence: We specialize in the design, manufacture, and sale of niche aerospace and defense components that are essential for today's aircraft and aerospace and defense systems.
We primarily serve three core end markets: commercial aerospace, business jet and general aviation, and defense.
We estimate that approximately 55% of our 2025 net sales were derived from aftermarket products.
